'''鈭歭-n-f''' ('''kalanaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quave|quave]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-n-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quave|quave]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-n-f
|-
! Lemma
| kalanaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilanaf|thilanaf]] || [[word:jilanaf|jilanaf]] || [[word:shilanaf|shilanaf]] || [[word:kilanaf|kilanaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulanaf|thuthulanaf]] || [[word:jujulanaf|jujulanaf]] || [[word:shushulanaf|shushulanaf]] || [[word:kukulanaf|kukulanaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulanaf|thulanaf]] || [[word:julanaf|julanaf]] || [[word:shulanaf|shulanaf]] || [[word:kulanaf|kulanaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulanaf|thulanaf]] || [[word:julanaf|julanaf]] || [[word:shulanaf|shulanaf]] || [[word:kulanaf|kulanaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelanaf|thelanaf]] || [[word:jelanaf|jelanaf]] || [[word:shelanaf|shelanaf]] || [[word:kelanaf|kelanaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholanaf|thotholanaf]] || [[word:jojolanaf|jojolanaf]] || [[word:shosholanaf|shosholanaf]] || [[word:kokolanaf|kokolanaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholanaf|tholanaf]] || [[word:jolanaf|jolanaf]] || [[word:sholanaf|sholanaf]] || [[word:kolanaf|kolanaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholanaf|tholanaf]] || [[word:jolanaf|jolanaf]] || [[word:sholanaf|sholanaf]] || [[word:kolanaf|kolanaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙lanaf|th忙lanaf]] || [[word:j忙lanaf|j忙lanaf]] || [[word:sh忙lanaf|sh忙lanaf]] || [[word:k忙lanaf|k忙lanaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalanaf|thathalanaf]] || [[word:jajalanaf|jajalanaf]] || [[word:shashalanaf|shashalanaf]] || [[word:kakalanaf|kakalanaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalanaf|thalanaf]] || [[word:jalanaf|jalanaf]] || [[word:shalanaf|shalanaf]] || [[word:kalanaf|kalanaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalanaf|thalanaf]] || [[word:jalanaf|jalanaf]] || [[word:shalanaf|shalanaf]] || [[word:kalanaf|kalanaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalanaf|shalanaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalanaf|goshalanaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalanaf|gokishalanaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalanafn眉|shalanafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalanafnkn眉|goshalanafnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalanafn眉|gokishalanafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalanafsh毛|shalanafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalanafnksh毛|goshalanafnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalanafsh毛|gokishalanafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalanafro|shalanafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalanafnkro|goshalanafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalanafro|gokishalanafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalanafmu|shalanafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalanafnkmu|goshalanafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalanafmu|gokishalanafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalanafsher|shalanafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalanafnksher|goshalanafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalanafsher|gokishalanafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalanafng|shalanafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalanafnkng|goshalanafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalanafng|gokishalanafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalanafya|shalanafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalanafnkya|goshalanafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalanafya|gokishalanafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalanafyam|shalanafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalanafnkyam|goshalanafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalanafyam|gokishalanafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalanafn眉sh毛|shalanafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalanafnkn眉sh毛|goshalanafnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalanafn眉sh毛|gokishalanafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalanafn眉ro|shalanafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalanafnkn眉ro|goshalanafnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalanafn眉ro|gokishalanafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalanafn眉mu|shalanafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalanafnkn眉mu|goshalanafnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalanafn眉mu|gokishalanafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalanafsh毛n眉|shalanafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalanafnksh毛n眉|goshalanafnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalanafsh毛n眉|gokishalanafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalanafsh毛ro|shalanafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalanafnksh毛ro|goshalanafnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalanafsh毛ro|gokishalanafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalanafsh毛mu|shalanafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalanafnksh毛mu|goshalanafnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalanafsh毛mu|gokishalanafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalanafron眉|shalanafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalanafnkron眉|goshalanafnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalanafron眉|gokishalanafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalanafrosh毛|shalanafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalanafnkrosh毛|goshalanafnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalanafrosh毛|gokishalanafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalanafromu|shalanafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalanafnkromu|goshalanafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalanafromu|gokishalanafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalanafmun眉|shalanafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalanafnkmun眉|goshalanafnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalanafmun眉|gokishalanafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalanafmush毛|shalanafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalanafnkmush毛|goshalanafnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalanafmush毛|gokishalanafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalanafmuro|shalanafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalanafnkmuro|goshalanafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalanafmuro|gokishalanafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
